prompt: An {argument name="style" default="impressionistic watercolor illustration"} captures a serene {argument name="setting" default="riverside gathering at sunset"}, where a group of people in late 19th-century attire sit on a grassy bank. A {argument name="subject" default="lone violinist"} stands under the sweeping branches of a large willow tree, serenading the onlookers as a steam locomotive crosses a steel truss bridge in the background. The warm glow of the setting sun reflects off the gentle ripples of the water, blending the industrial majesty of the train with the peaceful, pastoral atmosphere of the musical performance.
